name: Smoked Salmon Hero Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the French bread in the oven.
2. Slice it lengthwise and remove a small amount of bread from each side.
3. Spread each half with softened cream cheese.
4. Layer the salmon, cucumber, onion rings, olives, and watercress.
5. Grind some black pepper over the filling.
6. Close and slice diagonally into individual servings.
Serves 4.
Per Serving: 610 calories, 21 g protein, 63 g carbohydrate, 31 g fat (15 g saturated), 69 mg cholesterol, 7,238 mg sodium, 4 g fiber.
